title: Curateduk Freedom Inspirations White 3Ply Quilted Toilet Tissue Pack Of 45 Rolls (Soft White)
features: LUXURIOUS SOFTNESS - Enjoy premium comfort with Freedom Inspirations 3 Ply Toilet Roll, featuring a quilted soft white design that feels gentle and plush on every use. Each layer is crafted to deliver a soothing, velvety touch while maintaining strength and absorbency. Perfect for families seeking luxury in daily essentials, it ensures a soft, clean, and comfortable experience that elevates your bathroom routine every day.

STRENGTH & DURABILITY - Designed with advanced 3 Ply construction, this toilet paper combines superior softness with exceptional tear resistance. The thick and durable layers provide long-lasting reliability, preventing tearing or shredding during use. Ideal for busy households, Freedom Inspirations offers consistent performance with every sheet, giving you confidence in comfort, cleanliness, and quality.

ULTRA ABSORBENT CARE - Each roll is expertly designed for maximum absorbency, ensuring a clean and refreshing experience with fewer sheets needed. The triple-layered texture absorbs moisture efficiently while maintaining its plush feel. Whether for daily use or extra care during sensitive moments, Freedom Inspirations delivers a perfect balance of absorbency, softness, and strength.

GENTLE ON SKIN - Dermatologically tested and enriched for care, this toilet roll is safe and gentle for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The smooth, soft surface minimizes irritation while providing effective cleansing. Its skin-friendly texture ensures comfort for both adults and children, making it a trusted choice for every family member seeking extra softness and reliable hygiene.

FAMILY VALUE PACK - This bulk pack of 45 rolls offers excellent value, convenience, and lasting supply for families and shared spaces. Easy to store and long-lasting, these rolls are ideal for homes, offices, and guest bathrooms. Combining premium quality with everyday practicality, Freedom Inspirations 3 Ply Toilet Roll guarantees luxury, comfort, and affordability in every roll.
description: Freedom Inspirations Quilted Soft White 3 Ply Toilet Paper Roll, 45 Rolls Freedom toilet papers are designed to be used anytime where cleanliness and comfort are a priority. It is often the simple things that make life a whole lot easier. In our everyday lives, comfort and ease combined with responsible choices can make a big difference to our quality of life. It has the balance of softness and strength to leave you and your family feeling fresh and clean. QUILTED TOUCH: Freedom Inspirations Toilet Tissue possesses a luxurious quilted surface to give that feeling of softness and luxury. DECO EMBOSSED DESIGN: Featuring deco-embossed design on a white pure pulp paper, these toilet tissues come in 5 5-pack of 9 rolls, in total 45 rolls (160 sheets per roll). MICRO-IMPRESSIONS: Created with micro-impressions, Quilted, and ultra soft-to-touch yet absorbent and strong, with a touch of scented goodness, for softness your skin deserves. MADE IN UK: Made in the UK with sustainably sourced virgin pulp. Each toilet roll, like all Freedom tissue paper, is sustainably sourced. Features: Soft, strong, and absorbent. 3 layers of quilted softness in every sheet. Remove odour-causing bacteria. Hypoallergenic and safe toilet paper that won't irritate sensitive skin. Flushable wipes for the ultimate clean and fresh feeling. Ideal for everyday use. 45 Rolls (5 Packs of 9 Rolls) Specifications: Brand: Freedom Toilet Paper Ply: 3 Ply Sheets Per Roll: 160 Package Includes: 45 Rolls Freedom Inspirations Quilted White 3 Ply Toilet Paper
